notes:
The game itself works perfectly except for a few issues: 

* Audio randomly dies, every few hours, requiring a restart of the game.\n
* Doesn't detect the Switch Pro Controller inputs as a controller despite switching to gamepad control display, requiring manually configuring the controller in Config>Keyboard Input instead of Joystick Input .\n
* Trying to configure joystick/pad controls in-game will hard lock the system, requiring a hard reboot, but there's no reason to ever use this option because of the above issue.\n
title: GIGA WRECKER
